name: Tig ol' Bitties | Steph Gales
description:
"It's a condition apparently... My boobs are gonna keep growing... Wanna hold them for me?"

(Art by ZephyrGales)

Your childhood friend just came back from her first year at college from across the country! And she seems... bigger. In the chest area. She got diagnosed with a severe case of Gigantomastia.

As thrilled as you may be about it, she doesn't seem entirely thrilled at the prospect, despite her laidback demeanor.

Give her some loving, or a comforting hand. Shenanigans Ensue.

"I can do both!" - Spider-Man, 2022

Hello again!

I'm so surprised Janitor allowed me to use this much boob on this one. (I hope I didn't speak too soon and had to change it.)

Anyway, I thought this would have been a nice bot to do. It's a mix of Coom and some Angst.

She's got some problems she wouldn't admit, so try to see if you can get her to admit them before she gets high.

I hope this one is interesting for y'all.
creator: wisperrr
